节点.功能描述: Provides methods to operate or manage Bluetooth.
Indicate the profile connection state.
Indicate the profile id.
Indicate the profile uuid.
Indicate the major class of a bluetooth device.
Indicate the major minor class of a bluetooth device.
Bluetooth device address.

Get the profile connection state of the current device. With profileId, returns the current connection state of this profile, {@link ProfileConnectionState}. Without profileId, if any profile is connected, {@link ProfileConnectionState#STATE_CONNECTED} is returned. Otherwise, {@link ProfileConnectionState#STATE_DISCONNECTED} is returned.
注释信息: @param { ProfileId } [profileId] - Indicate the profile id. This is an optional parameter.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - Invalid parameter. Possible causes: 1. Incorrect parameter types.

parameters.说明: ProfileId } [profileId] - Indicate the profile id. This is an optional parameter.

error_codes.description: Invalid parameter. Possible causes: 1. Incorrect parameter types.
